message:
🐛 Fix healthy clusters showing as degraded in ClusterHealth card

Changed health logic: if cluster has nodes > 0, consider healthy unless
explicitly set to false (healthy !== false instead of checking healthy === true).
This handles the case where cluster.healthy is undefined during initial load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
